question_text: Describe a moment in the past year when you felt your workplace handled equity and diversity well, or poorly. What happened?
How well does leadership at your organization treat equity and diversity as an everyday priority, and how do you know?
How equitable are hiring, promotion, and pay decisions across different groups at your organization?
Describe how respect, inclusion, or microaggressions show up in your day-to-day work.
If you could change one thing about equity or diversity in your workplace, what would it be and why?
